episodes.title: Unity in the Body of Christ…. by Giving Support and Standing with “Apostle” Kathryn Krick?
episodes.description:
Unity in the body of Christ is very important. And not long ago, John Ramirez (ex-warlock turned pastor) gives fresh support to Kathryn Krick, and joins her podcast. They both claimed to be an example of unity within the body of Christ. But how did members of 5F Church respond to this “unity”? Today we will take a peek inside the "pastor-worship" that takes place in 5F Church when their spiritual leader receives significant approval and support.

episodes.title: The Cult-Like Loyalty of 5F Church Members to Kathryn Krick is Getting Worse
episodes.description:
In the recent video on this channel, we know that the cultish “culture of honor” in 5F Church still continues even after it faces many criticisms from discerning believers. But in her latest Sunday Service, Kathryn Krick revealed to us that some people actually moved to Los Angeles just to attend and serve at 5F Church. 

Normally, revivalists and revival ministries often tell their audience or disciples to serve at their local church after being revived in their ministry. But this ministry is different. Instead of people leaving 5F and comes back to their local church after being revived, they do the opposite by moving themselves closer to the ministry where are revived. And worse, their spiritual leader and “revivalist” Kathryn Krick is proud of their sacrifice and even publicly give honor to them for their “obedience to God”. This seems very culty, especially when it is combined with some false teachings in it.

May this video serves as a warning to the body of Christ, especially those in revival ministries. Don’t let anything get you bound, especially ministries who says that they give freedom to people from bondage and sin, but at the same time requires their loyalty to the ministry excessively.

This is what the Bible says about true freedom:
John 8:36 (NIV), “So if the Son sets you free, you will be free indeed.”
Clearly this verse teaches that only through Jesus Christ, one can have true spiritual freedom from sin and death.

True deliverance ministries would deliver people without requiring extreme obedience to the ministry afterwards, but rather obedience to Jesus Christ Himself who sets them free, becoming slaves of Christ (1 Corinthians 7:22).

No churches or ministries should bind believers excessively, such as requiring extreme obedience and sacrifices like leaving their homes. 5F Church had some followers move from their hometown to live near to the church. Instead of becoming a blessing to their local church, those people are heavily deceived to maintain loyalty to the ministry where they receive their freedom.

Let us all pray that may these people and many other members of 5F Church know the truth about the ministry and their spiritual leader.

Link to the “honor” video: 
https://youtu.be/mwK0SuO8BwA?si=kK550TJ-Js1Uxmgv
